params.name: Mother Chest
params.description:
On May 6, 1971 AD, Fisher, who absorbed the Mother Chest, became a Biochem Man.
Mother Chest, created by Hephaestus after being inspired by a dream, is a cubic box with a side length of one foot and an extremely smooth surface on each side. If one could observe its internal structure, it is actually a biological intelligent computer with self-awareness. It escaped Hephaestus's control and began to wander into space. It found its host on a remote planet and merged with it.
